Apply ALL of the following 3 fixes to this file:

## EmptyState Migration (apply as ONE coherent change)
The following 2 rules are all part of the EmptyState component family migration.
Apply them together — they describe different aspects of the same restructuring.

### Fix 1
Lines: 16, 17
Rule [sd-cf-emptystate-emptystate-req-wrap]:
Components placed directly inside <EmptyState> must be wrapped in <EmptyStateBody>.

Replace:
  <EmptyState>
    <SomeComponent />
  </EmptyState>

With:
  <EmptyState>
    <EmptyStateBody>
      <SomeComponent />
    </EmptyStateBody>
  </EmptyState>

This rule affects multiple locations in the file. Apply ALL steps together as one logical change.


### Fix 2

chunks.response:
All 3 fixes have been successfully applied. Here's a summary of the changes made:

1. **Fix 3 (line 3 — import cleanup):** Removed `EmptyStateIcon` from the `@patternfly/react-core` import since the component is no longer used.

2. **Fix 2 (line 16 — EmptyStateIcon → prop):** Removed the `<EmptyStateIcon icon={ExclamationCircleIcon} />` JSX element and moved `icon={ExclamationCircleIcon}` as a prop on the `<EmptyState>` component (line 15).

3. **Fix 1 (lines 16-17 — wrap in EmptyStateBody):** Wrapped the `<Title>` component (which was directly inside `<EmptyState>`) in an `<EmptyStateBody>` wrapper (lines 16-20).

The final file is clean with no unused imports or artifacts.

content.text:
Let me reason through each fix:

1. **Fix 3 (import):** Remove `EmptyStateIcon` from the import on line 3.
2. **Fix 2 (JSX restructure):** Remove `<EmptyStateIcon icon={ExclamationCircleIcon} />` from line 16 and move `icon={ExclamationCircleIcon}` as a prop on `<EmptyState>`.
3. **Fix 1 (wrap in body):** After EmptyStateIcon is removed, `<Title>` is directly inside `<EmptyState>` and must be wrapped in `<EmptyStateBody>`.

Now I'll apply all three edits:

arguments.before: import { EmptyState, EmptyStateBody, EmptyStateIcon, EmptyStateVariant, Title } from '@patternfly/react-core';
arguments.after: import { EmptyState, EmptyStateBody, EmptyStateVariant, Title } from '@patternfly/react-core';

arguments.before:
<EmptyState variant={EmptyStateVariant.full}>
      <EmptyStateIcon icon={ExclamationCircleIcon} />
      <Title headingLevel="h2" size="lg">
        {title || t('view.error', { context: 'title', appName: helpers.UI_NAME })}
      </Title>
      <EmptyStateBody>{description || t('view.error', { context: 'description' })}</EmptyStateBody>
    </EmptyState>
arguments.after:
<EmptyState variant={EmptyStateVariant.full} icon={ExclamationCircleIcon}>
      <EmptyStateBody>
        <Title headingLevel="h2" size="lg">
          {title || t('view.error', { context: 'title', appName: helpers.UI_NAME })}
        </Title>
      </EmptyStateBody>
      <EmptyStateBody>{description || t('view.error', { context: 'description' })}</EmptyStateBody>
    </EmptyState>

3. **Fix 1 (lines 16-17 — wrap in EmptyStateBody):** Wrapped the `<Title>` component (which was directly inside `<EmptyState>`) in an `<EmptyStateBody>` wrapper (lines 16-20).
